heading: Returns relating to certain life insurance contract transactions
label: 6050Y Returns relating to certain life insurance contract transactions

amendments: Effective DateSection applicable to reportable policy sales (as defined in subsection (d)(2) of this section) after , and reportable death benefits (as defined in subsection (d)(4) of this section) paid after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2017 Amendment note under .Dec. 31, 2017Dec. 31, 2017section 13520(d) of Pub. L. 115–97section 6047 of this title

children.heading: Requirement of reporting of certain payments
children.label: a Requirement of reporting of certain payments
A
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of such person,

children.label: B
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of each recipient of payment in the reportable policy sale,

children.label: C
children.text: the date of such sale,

children.label: D
children.text: the name of the issuer of the life insurance contract sold and the policy number of such contract, and

children.label: E
children.text: the amount of each payment.

children.heading: Statement to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
children.label: 2 Statement to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
A
children.text: the name, address, and phone number of the information contact of the person required to make such return, and

children.label: B
children.text: the information required to be shown on such return with respect to such person, except that in the case of an issuer of a life insurance contract, such statement is not required to include the information specified in paragraph (1)(E).

children.heading: Requirement of reporting of seller’s basis in life insurance contracts
children.label: b Requirement of reporting of seller’s basis in life insurance contracts
A
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of the seller who transfers any interest in such contract in such sale,

children.label: B
children.text: the investment in the contract (as defined in section 72(e)(6)) with respect to such seller, and

children.label: C
children.text: the policy number of such contract.

children.heading: Statement to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
children.label: 2 Statement to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
A
children.text: the name, address, and phone number of the information contact of the person required to make such return, and

children.label: B
children.text: the information required to be shown on such return with respect to each seller whose name is required to be set forth in such return.

children.heading: Requirement of reporting with respect to reportable death benefits
children.label: c Requirement of reporting with respect to reportable death benefits
A
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of the person making such payment,

children.label: B
children.text: the name, address, and TIN of each recipient of such payment,

children.label: C
children.text: the date of each such payment,

children.label: D
children.text: the gross amount of each such payment, and

children.label: E
children.text: such person’s estimate of the investment in the contract (as defined in section 72(e)(6)) with respect to the buyer.

children.heading: Statement to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
children.label: 2 Statement to be furnished to persons with respect to whom information is required
A
children.text: the name, address, and phone number of the information contact of the person required to make such return, and

children.label: B
children.text: the information required to be shown on such return with respect to each recipient of payment whose name is required to be set forth in such return.

children.heading: Payment
children.label: 1 Payment
children.text: The term “payment” means, with respect to any reportable policy sale, the amount of cash and the fair market value of any consideration transferred in the sale.

children.heading: Reportable policy sale
children.label: 2 Reportable policy sale
children.text: The term “reportable policy sale” has the meaning given such term in section 101(a)(3)(B).

children.heading: Issuer
children.label: 3 Issuer
children.text: The term “issuer” means any life insurance company that bears the risk with respect to a life insurance contract on the date any return or statement is required to be made under this section.

children.heading: Reportable death benefits
children.label: 4 Reportable death benefits
children.text: The term “reportable death benefits” means amounts paid by reason of the death of the insured under a life insurance contract that has been transferred in a reportable policy sale.
